name: TAPLA Dark Premium
description: Темный премиум — для флагманских товаров, luxury-сегмента, игровых устройств.

design_spec.background: Dark charcoal to black gradient (#1A1A1A to #0D0D0D), subtle radial highlight behind the product. No textures.
design_spec.lighting: Dramatic single key light from top-left at 45° (beauty dish), subtle rim light from behind (15% intensity, cool white #E8E8E8). Deep shadows, high contrast. Product must be clearly visible.
design_spec.color_palette: Product retains natural colors. Accent elements in TAPLA gold #C9A96E. Text white #FFFFFF. Highlight accents in thin gold lines.

typography.headlines: Bold geometric sans-serif (like Montserrat 700), 28-48pt, color #FFFFFF, uppercase
typography.badges: Bold condensed, 12-16pt, gold text on transparent dark background

mandatory_elements: TAPLA logo bottom-right corner (small, 40px, gold, 20% opacity)

text_rules.language: AZERBAIJANI LATIN ONLY. Never English. Never Russian. Never Cyrillic.
text_rules.tone: Elite, exclusive, flagship. Powerful and premium.
